variants: Baran Ersoy is a skilled shipwright currently employed by Knotwise Shipwrights. He was born in Vermilion Green, where his early fascination with maritime craftsmanship took root. He is the author of the innovative Dawnstone Indexer, designed to optimize ship design and construction. His efforts have been recognized with the prestigious Riverstone Seal, a testament to his commitment and skill in shipbuilding.
